title: Chicken scream
description: this mod adds a probability of 1 in  100000 that chickens will scream like the chicken on a tree from that meme that is roaming instagram
body: the mod is a meme mod inspireted by the foxy mod from terraria, in as simply as that every tick with a chicken alive the chicken has a probability of 1 in 100000 to make the scream of that chicken on a tree scream meme that was being infecting instragram resently
